focus: Q2: Design dispatch-model.cjs generalization — config schema and wiring path from loop.cjs mode to resolved dispatcher

label: Wiring path: loop.cjs reads improvement_config.json.mode, dynamic-require dispatch-model.cjs only when mode=model-benchmark; otherwise no-op dispatcher
Backward-compat guarantee: mode absent/unset/agent-improvement means dispatch-model.cjs never loaded, loop.cjs unchanged for agent-improvement
loop.cjs must never load dispatch-model.cjs when mode=agent-improvement
